---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or refinement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- The user-visible pain. Not the implementation; the symptom. Example: "When I have a multi-AC milestone, the Trello board doesn't reflect per-AC progress, so I lose visibility into which requirements have passed verification." -->

## Proposed shape

<!-- Sketch the change. Reference existing patterns. Examples: "A new subagent that...", "A new bridge for vendor X...", "Extend the audit tool with a section that...", "A new hook that...". -->

## Why this fits code4me's architecture

<!-- Code4me has strong conventions (subagent + context_queries, bridge + STRICT BRIDGE PROTOCOL, hooks return ask never deny, probes are the spec). Explain how the proposal fits, or where it deliberately departs. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What did you think about and discard? Why? -->

## Concrete adoption shape

- [ ] User-visible feature (new behaviour in dispatches / cards / probes)
- [ ] Internal refactor / cleanup
- [ ] New integration (vendor / MCP / external tool)
- [ ] Documentation / onboarding improvement
- [ ] Other:

## Effort estimate

<!-- Rough size: an afternoon / a day / a few days / multi-week. Helps maintainers prioritize. -->

## Are you willing to send a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'll draft a PR
- [ ] No, but I'm happy to review one
- [ ] I'd like maintainer to lead; I'll consult
